name: google-places-local-leads
description: Find local businesses by search query and geography, then enrich each place into a CRM-ready prospect row.
business_value: Local lead generation for agencies, field sales, recruiting, and service providers.

inputs.name: query
inputs.note: Business category plus geography, such as 'dental clinics in Austin'.

auth.note: Use field masks to control Places API cost.

verification_result: Example fixture validates local-business lead rows with contact, rating, and location fields.
known_risks: Requires a Google Maps Platform API key and billable Places requests.
Some businesses lack websites or phone numbers.
Field masks must be kept narrow to avoid unnecessary cost.
